_comment: Example MCP configuration for Claude Code. Copy to mcp.json and fill in values.

databricks.description: Query Unity Catalog, run SQL, manage jobs

azure-devops.description: Create PRs, manage repos, track work items

databricks: 1. Install Databricks CLI: pip install databricks-cli
3. The managed MCP uses your Databricks CLI auth automatically
azure-devops: 1. Create a Personal Access Token (PAT) in Azure DevOps
2. Grant: Code (Read & Write), Pull Requests (Read & Write)
confluence: 3. Update CONFLUENCE_SPACE to your space key

databricks: List tables: 'Show me all tables in hackathon_catalog.grocery'
Query data: 'Query the top 10 products by order count'
Check job: 'What's the status of my last job run?'
azure-devops: Create PR: 'Create a pull request for my changes'
Check builds: 'Show me the status of the latest build'
confluence: Document: 'Create a Confluence page documenting my pipeline'
Search: 'Find Confluence pages about data quality'
